dungeon: GENUINE ROTF multi-dungeon group run (~180s, 8 entries, busy global feed). Corroboration-heavy: base-game Archdemon Malphas (Abyss) + the BUILT ROTF Firebreather (verbatim corroboration of its corrected lines) + an event-boss /25 feed. No NEW boss isolated. Notable build-variant detail: the event-defeat counter is /25 here (vs /30 seen in other builds).
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+bossends: an 8-entry multi-dungeon hop — dark SPACE/VOID arenas (b004_70s, scattered red/purple bullets = Abyss/void boss), a distinctive GOLD/YELLOW CHECKERED CROSS-shaped arena (b006-area; Shatters-style cross plus floor), GREEN grass realms, tan SANDY arenas w/ structures, and RED/dark dungeon rooms. No single contiguous layout (hunt-style multi-dungeon).

bosses.name: Archdemon Malphas
attacks: void-arena scattered red/purple bullet clusters (b004_70s; approximate, not clean geometry)
taunts: You will regret your decision.. DIE!
My minions are failing me! I will...
I have been defeated... My demons will crush you!

bosses.name: Firebreather
taunts: Death is your reward! Say no more and I'll make it quick!
Your courage softens me... considering it won't be lasting much longer!

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: a server-wide EVENT-BOSS /25 defeat-counter feed (Mad Jester 23/25; Firebreather 4/25 -> 11/25; Pentaract Tower Ultra spawn) -> NOTABLE: this build uses a /25 counter, whereas other builds/footage show /30 (the [[rotf-stat-systems]] note had Riverborn 22/30 etc.) -> the event-counter cap is BUILD-DEPENDENT (25 vs 30). Plus 'X has achieved the max level' notifications and a '6man' group-host mention. Bosses are base Malphas (Abyss) + built Firebreather (corroboration).
uncertain: No NEW/ROTF-custom boss isolated (all readable bosses = base Malphas + built Firebreather). Attack geometry NOT cleanly traced (void arena = scattered red bullets, gold-cross arena unattributed; no clean ring/spiral). The /25 vs /30 counter difference is build-variant (both observed). Most chat = player banter ('me go toilet', loot calls, 'gibby i can host 6man'). Malphas/Firebreather lines partly right-edge cut but match known verbatim sets.
confidence: MEDIUM (corroboration) / NONE (new boss). GENUINE ROTF multi-dungeon run. Value = corroboration of base Malphas + the BUILT Firebreather's corrected lines (verbatim) + a build-variant detail (event counter is /25 here, vs /30 elsewhere). No new buildable boss, no clean attacks. Recorded honestly. Best follow-up: a clean single-boss clip for the gold-cross-arena boss (unidentified).
